items.example: I'll send you a text when I arrive.
Could you forward that email to me?
We chat through instant messages every day.
She spends too much time on social media.
Let's have a video call this weekend.
He left a voicemail while I was in a meeting.
I can't open the attachment you sent.
Please reply to my message as soon as possible.
Can you forward me the information?
Let's keep in touch after the course ends.
